title: Aztec Foundations: Protocol Architecture Overview | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
In this talk, Ciara Nightingale, Technical Education Lead at Cyfrin, breaks down the protocol architecture of Aztec Network.

By walking through the lifecycle of an Aztec transaction, this session introduces the core components and concepts that power the network and lays the foundation for building applications on Aztec.
